response.justification: The candidate comfortably clears the minimum bar with roughly 19 years of hands-on engineering across web, embedded, low-latency, and cloud systems, plus genuine entrepreneurial experience as founder of an open-source geo-data platform. However, this is a director-level AI strategy role that asks for recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products or platforms, and his AI exposure is limited to about a year of recent agent-infrastructure and MCP tooling work. His trajectory is strong senior/staff delivery engineering rather than principal-level strategy, customer advisory, or public technical leadership in AI, making him a stretch for this particular scope.
strengths: 19+ years of broad engineering experience spanning web, embedded, low-latency, and cloud systems
Founder of GISCollective, showing sustained entrepreneurial initiative and product ownership
Current hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI products/platforms at scale, the core of this role
Career history is senior/staff IC delivery work, not director-level strategy or executive advisory
Lacks the preferred advanced degree in an AI-related field; AI experience is roughly one year deep

key_factors.factor: Limited recognized AI expertise and strategy scope
Entrepreneurial founder and recent AI tooling experience
